TrendEnergyFallingMessages: My stomach is turning against me.
I need food before my strength goes.
Every step costs more than I have.
I cannot run on nothing much longer.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
TrendWaterFallingMessages: Dehydration is starting to slow my thoughts.
I have to find something safe to drink.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
TrendBloodFallingMessages: I need to stop this before it gets worse.
Warmth is leaving with every drop.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
TrendHealthFallingMessages: This trend health falling is getting to me.
I need to pay attention to this trend health falling.
Something about this trend health falling feels wrong.
I should not ignore this trend health falling.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
TrendTemperatureWorseningMessages: This trend temperature worsening is getting to me.
I need to pay attention to this trend temperature worsening.
Something about this trend temperature worsening feels wrong.
I should not ignore this trend temperature worsening.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
TrendWetnessWorseningMessages: The weather is wearing me down.
This makes every sound harder to trust.
I need to get out of this weather.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
LongSicknessMessages: I need medicine before this gets worse.
My body is fighting and losing ground.
This sickness is stealing my strength.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
LongBleedingMessages: I need to stop this before it gets worse.
Warmth is leaving with every drop.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ProlongedStarvationMessages: This prolonged starvation is getting to me.
I need to pay attention to this prolonged starvation.
Something about this prolonged starvation feels wrong.
I should not ignore this prolonged starvation.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ProlongedDehydrationMessages: Dehydration is starting to slow my thoughts.
I have to find something safe to drink.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ProlongedColdMessages: The cold is getting into my bones.
I need warmth before this gets worse.
Shelter and heat. That is all that matters.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ProlongedHeatMessages: I should remember this if I live long enough.
ProlongedBleedingMessages: I need to stop this before it gets worse.
Warmth is leaving with every drop.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ProlongedSicknessMessages: I need medicine before this gets worse.
My body is fighting and losing ground.
This sickness is stealing my strength.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PersonalityPracticalMessages: Check supplies, check exits, keep moving.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PersonalityScaredMessages: I do not want to die here.
Something is watching. It has to be.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PersonalityMilitaryMessages: Someone else will come here armed.
I should assume I am being watched.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PersonalityHopelessMessages: I am tired of pretending this gets better.
Maybe surviving is just a slower way to lose.
Keep walking. That is all I have left.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PersonalityAggressiveMessages: Hit first if it comes to it.
I will not be easy prey.
Let them make the first mistake.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PersonalityCalmMessages: There is still a way through this.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
MentalStateStableMessages: Keep priorities simple. Water, food, shelter.
I can handle this if I stay methodical.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
MentalStateUneasyMessages: I cannot shake the feeling that I am being watched.
I need to slow down and listen.
This place is getting under my skin.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
MentalStateAfraidMessages: Do not panic. Panic wastes energy.
I hate how close everything sounds.
Fear is useful if it keeps me careful.
I need to breathe and keep moving.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
MentalStateDesperateMessages: I am running out of choices.
I need supplies before I need a plan.
Desperation makes people loud. I need to stay smart.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
MentalStateNumbMessages: I do not feel much anymore.
Maybe numb is better than scared.
Keep moving. Feeling can come later.
This place takes pieces from everyone.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
MentalStateAggressiveMessages: If someone pushes me now, they will regret it.
I am tired of being hunted.
Threats need to be dealt with before they grow.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
MentalStateBrokenMessages: I do not know how much longer I can keep doing this.
I need one reason to keep moving.
The world is getting smaller with every step.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
MentalStateFocusedMessages: Focus. Check corners. Check supplies. Move.
Noise, cover, exits. Nothing else matters.
I need to solve the next problem, not all of them.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PlayerMemoryRecentDamageMessages: That hit is still on my mind.
I need to keep moving after that.
I should not let that happen again.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PlayerMemoryRecentBleedingMessages: I can still feel where I was bleeding.
That wound could have ended me.
I need to check myself before moving on.
Blood loss changes how everything feels.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PlayerMemoryRecentGunshotMessages: That gunshot is still ringing in my head.
Someone with a gun changes everything.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PlayerMemoryRecentCorpseMessages: Someone died close by. I should not ignore that.
Bodies draw questions, flies, and people.
I need to leave before I become part of the scene.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PlayerMemoryRecentMilitaryMessages: I should assume someone watched this place before me.
The risk here follows me even after I leave.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PlayerMemoryRecentSurvivalCrisisMessages: I came too close to dying.
My body needs a break before it gives up.
I need food, water, warmth, and time.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
